_metadata.note: Arrr! A swashbucklin' language fer seafarin' scallywags!

preview.contains_dlls: ⚠ Contains DLL cargo - Only load from trusted ports!

settings.title: Riggin' & Sails
settings.close_on_launch: Close Launcher When Game Sets Sail
settings.dll_injection_hint: Creates manifest fer Mewjector chainloader (required fer .dll cargo)
settings.dll_injection_warning: ⚠ Security: Only load DLL cargo from trusted ports

messages.setup_required_text:
Game coordinates ain't charted yet, cap'n.
Please enter yer bearings.
messages.game_dir_required: Game port directory be required, arrr.
messages.game_dir_invalid: Game port directory be invalid, ye scurvy dog.
messages.game_dir_not_detected: Can't spot th' Mewgenics port from here.
messages.exe_not_found: Mewgenics.exe not spotted in th' selected port.
messages.launch_failed:
Failed to set sail with Mewgenics:
{error}
messages.permission_denied_modlist:
Access denied: Can't write to th' ship's log.
Make sure th' hold has proper access.
messages.proton_warning_text:
Ye be runnin' on Linux with a Windows .exe (Proton).

Mods outside th' game bay may not work proper-like.
'Tis recommended to keep mods in th' game hold on Linux/Steam Deck.

Sail on anyway?
messages.no_mods_text: No mods be aboard. Recruit some crew first.
messages.launch_options_instructions:
Copy these launch orders and paste 'em in Steam:
Right-click game → Properties → Launch Options

Note: On Linux/Proton/Steam Deck, keep mods in th' game bay fer best sailin'.
messages.export_bat_instructions:
Th' launch orders have been scribed. To use with Steam:

1. Right-click Mewgenics in yer Steam fleet
2. Select Properties → Launch Options
3. Paste th' followin' orders:
messages.export_bat_note: Note: Th' scroll contains all yer current mod cargo. Re-export if ye change cargo or riggin'.
messages.dll_injection_prompt:
⚠ SECURITY WARNIN': DLL cargo can execute any orders with full ship authority. Only enable DLL cargo from trusted ports!

This cargo contains DLL files. Would ye like to enable DLL mod cargo?

Mewism will create a manifest that Mewjector (external DLL chainloader) can read. Ye can change this in Riggin' & Sails > Launch Orders later.
messages.dll_injection_chainloader_warning: ⚠ WARNIN': chainloader.ini not spotted in yer game bay. Ye need to install Mewjector (DLL chainloader) fer DLL cargo to work.
messages.dll_cleanup_nothing: No DLL manifest found in chainloader riggin'.
messages.dll_cleanup_confirm:
This'll clear th' DLL manifest from chainloader riggin'.

Continue?
messages.dll_cleanup_success: DLL manifest has been cleared from chainloader riggin'.
